ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease or syndrome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the disease */,
  "ICD_Code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases code for standardization */,
  "Prevalence" INTEGER /* Number of cases of the disease */,
  "Risk_Factors" TEXT /* Known risk factors for the disease */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the disease record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic procedure */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease this procedure relates to */,
  "procedure_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnostic procedure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the procedure */,
  "Procedure_Cost" REAL /* Cost of the diagnostic procedure */,
  "Insurance_Coverage" INTEGER /* Whether the procedure is covered by insurance */,
  "Duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the procedure in minutes */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the procedure record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_procedures_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease this symptom relates to */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the symptom */,
  "Severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the symptom */,
  "Commonality" INTEGER /* Whether the symptom is common for the disease */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the symptom record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory test result */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease this result relates to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the laboratory test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the laboratory result */,
  "Reference_Range" TEXT /* Normal range for the test result */,
  "Unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the test result */,
  "Is_Abnormal" INTEGER /* Whether the result is abnormal */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_results_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pharmacological_substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pharmacological substance */,
  "substance_name" TEXT /* Name of the pharmacological substance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pharmacological substance */,
  "Form" TEXT /* Form of the substance */,
  "Strength" TEXT /* Strength of the substance */,
  "Side_Effects" TEXT /* Known side effects of the substance */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the substance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease this treatment relates to */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacological substance prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the pharmacological substance */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  "Start_Date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "End_Date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "Is_Completed" INTEGER /* Whether the treatment has been completed */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES pharmacological_substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "Address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "Phone" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "Email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "Emergency_Contact_Name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "Emergency_Contact_Phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient attending the appointment */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease being treated during the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor attending the appointment */,
  "Time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "Status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment */,
  "Notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the appointment */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the appointment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor (e.g., gastroenterology, cardiology) */,
  "License_Number" TEXT /* Medical license number of the doctor */,
  "Qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications and certifications of the doctor */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the doctor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosed disease */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "History_Notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the medical history */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the medical history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_histories_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_histories_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_records" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the billing */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment associated with the billing */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount charged for the treatment */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date of the billing */,
  "Payment_Method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "Payment_Status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the billing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_records_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who underwent the test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the lab test was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  "Lab_ID" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory where the test was performed */,
  "Lab_Name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "Lab_Address" TEXT /* Address of the laboratory */,
  "Last_Updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the lab test record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
